description_long: This is a compact, rectangular wallet with a dark, matte exterior and visible white stitching along the edges, giving it a refined and professional appearance. The wallet features a flap with a tab closure, which is secured by a snap button, providing both security and style. The surface is smooth with subtle stitching lines that add a touch of detail without being overly decorative. On the upper right corner of the front, there is a printed inscription in Cyrillic, suggesting a brand or model identifier. The wallet appears to be made primarily of synthetic leather or faux leather, with a likely fabric or synthetic lining inside. Its slim profile and understated design make it suitable for everyday urban use, easily fitting into a pocket or bag.
description: A slim, dark wallet with white stitching, a tab snap closure, and a printed Cyrillic inscription on the front. The surface is smooth and matte, with a professional, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the tab closure and the Cyrillic inscription on the upper right corner.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wallet and the tab closure extending from the side.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain surface with visible stitching and the tab closure folded over.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the uninterrupted back surface and the tab closure from a different angle.
attribute_brand_logo: There is a printed Cyrillic inscription on the upper right corner of the front, reading 'БЛОКНОТ CW-0924', but no recognizable brand logo or insignia.
